title: The Order Block Myth That's Killing Your Funded Account
description: Everyone trades order blocks wrong. Here's the truth that 90% of ICT traders miss — and why it's costing them their funded accounts. R2F Trading breaks down the real smart money concept behind order blocks so you stop leaving money on the table.
script: If you've blown a funded account, order blocks probably killed it. Every beginner trades every order block they see. That's the trap. And 90% of ICT traders fall for it. Here's why it's wrong. Not every order block is created equal. Smart money doesn't leave footprints everywhere. Stale blocks get swept. You're walking into their liquidity grab. The truth? Only order blocks with a fair value gap above or below them matter. That's your confirmation. That's where institutional money actually defends price. One filter. Changed everything. Stop trading blind. Start trading with confluence. Follow R2F Trading for real ICT setups daily.
